focus: inventory questions are resolved with `discover`, never by grepping .robot files
query: Which tests in this project have the 'smoke' tag?
files: demo-project — the 'smoke' tag is on 'Login Works' and 'Shipped Order Has Status Shipped'
expected_behavior: Uses `robotcode discover` to resolve the real set (e.g. `discover tags --tests` or `discover tests -i smoke`)
Does NOT grep / scan / read .robot files to answer — the effective tag set is resolved at runtime (paths, profiles, variables, pre-run modifiers)
Reports the matching tests (or that there are none)
